samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Divide a 16-bit number by an 8-bit number.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">Dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">Divider.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">Quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">Remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Register declarations for storing inputs
        reg [15:0] a_reg;
        reg [7:0] b_reg;
        
        // Combinational logic for division
        always @(A, B) begin
            a_reg = A;
            b_reg = B;
            
            // Initialize variables for division
            integer i;
            reg [15:0] quotient;
            reg [15:0] remainder;
            reg [15:0] temp_remainder;
            reg [15:0] shifted_divisor;
            reg [15:0] shifted_quotient;
            reg [15:0] final_result;
            reg [15:0] final_odd;
            
            // Perform division operation
            for (i = 15; i >= 0; i = i - 1) begin
                shifted_divisor = {b_reg[7], b_reg} << (15 - i);
                temp_remainder = remainder | (a_reg[i] ? 1 : 0) << (15 - i);
                
                if (temp_remainder >= shifted_divisor) begin
                    remainder = temp_remainder - shifted_divisor;
                    quotient[i] = 1;
                end else begin
                    remainder = temp_remainder;
                    quotient[i] = 0;
                end
                
                if (i > 0) begin
                    shifted_quotient = quotient >> 1;
                    final_result = shifted_quotient;
                    final_odd = remainder;
                end
            end
            
            // Assign outputs
            result = final_result;
            odd = final_odd;
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
